KASHYAP BHANDERI 
AI / ML Engineer  ·  Python Developer  ·  Computer Vision Enthusiast 
+91 8799271918  |  kashyapbhanderi15260@gmail.com  |  linkedin.com/in/Kashyap-Bhanderi  |  github.com/kashyapbhanderi  |  
Surat, Gujarat, India 
 
SUMMARY 
 
B.Tech IT student (2023–2027) with hands-on industry experience as an ML Intern at WeProvision Infotech, where I 
architected and shipped a production-grade Multimodal Agentic AI Document Intelligence Platform serving end-to-end RAG

workflows across 3+ modalities. Skilled in LangChain, LangGraph, GraphRAG, computer vision, and full-stack AI systems. 
Oracle AI Foundations Associate certified. 
EXPERIENCE 
 
Machine Learning Intern 
May 2025 – Jun 2025 
WeProvision Infotech  |  Sarthana Jakatnaka, Surat, Gujarat, 395013 
• Designed and built the Multimodal Agentic AI Document Intelligence Platform — a production-grade RAG system using

LangChain, LangGraph, Weaviate, and FastAPI, reducing average query latency by ~35% compared to baseline retrieval 
through hybrid BM25 + vector search. 
• Implemented LoRA/PEFT fine-tuning pipeline, PaddleOCR integration, and async task processing with Redis/Celery, 
cutting document ingestion time by ~40% via parallel async workers. 
• Extended the platform post-internship as a Final Year Project with GraphRAG knowledge-graph retrieval, agentic long-

term memory, MLflow experiment tracking, and RAGAS evaluation — improving retrieval precision by ~28% on multi-
hop queries over 5+ document types. 
PROJECTS 
 
Multimodal Agentic AI — Document Intelligence Platform 
Final Year Project · Initiated at WeProvision Infotech 
Tech: Python · LangChain · LangGraph · FastAPI · Weaviate · GraphRAG · NetworkX · spaCy · Docker · MLflow · LoRA/PEFT · RAGAS

• Architected a production-grade multi-agent platform for intelligent document ingestion, hybrid semantic search (BM25 
+ vector), and multimodal (text + chart/image) understanding using a LangChain + LangGraph Planner–Executor–Critic 
pipeline. 
• Implemented GraphRAG — built a NetworkX knowledge graph from spaCy-extracted entities and LLM-derived 
relationships, fused with vector search via Reciprocal Rank Fusion to enable multi-hop reasoning across documents and

improve retrieval on complex, multi-entity queries. 
• Added agentic long-term memory (episodic + semantic) backed by Weaviate, enabling the agent to recall user 
preferences and prior corrections across sessions for personalized, context-aware responses. 
• Delivered an end-to-end RAG pipeline with async FastAPI backend (Redis/Celery, SSE streaming), Prometheus + Grafana 
observability, validated through RAGAS evaluation and MLflow experiment tracking to reduce hallucinations and

monitor retrieval quality. 
AI Stock Predictor 
Academic Project 
Tech: Python · TensorFlow · LSTM · FinBERT · Streamlit · NLP 
• Engineered a "Dual-Brain" trading dashboard combining a 60-day LSTM price model with live FinBERT sentiment 
analysis on real-time news, generating unified Buy/Sell/Hold signals with confidence scores. 
• Deployed an interactive Streamlit dashboard for real-time prediction visualization and model confidence scoring,
enabling end-to-end pipeline from raw data to actionable signal in under 2 seconds.

Vision-Based Multimodal HCI System 
Personal Project 
Tech: Python · OpenCV · MediaPipe · Speech Recognition · Gesture AI 
• Built a real-time touchless HCI system using OpenCV and MediaPipe for hand/eye tracking and gesture-based 
application control, supporting 10+ gesture commands out of the box. 
• Optimized inference to sub-50 ms on standard webcams via multithreading; integrated voice commands for fully 
multimodal input without any dedicated hardware.

B.Tech in Information Technology
